title: Amazon Product Scraper Input
description: Scrape Amazon product details or search results. Extract price, reviews, ratings, BSR, features, and images from any Amazon marketplace. Free Jungle Scout alternative.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Scraping mode: 'product' scrapes direct Amazon product URLs for full details. 'search' searches Amazon by keyword and returns product listings.
enumTitles: Keyword Search (search Amazon and return listings)

urls.title: Product URLs
urls.description: List of Amazon product URLs to scrape (product mode only). Supports any Amazon marketplace URL containing /dp/ or /product/.

keywords.title: Search Keywords
keywords.description: Search query for Amazon keyword search (search mode only). Example: 'wireless earbuds', 'laptop stand'.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return (search mode only).
